calendar.matters:
Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admissions
Off Calendar Oct-07-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2021 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-14-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Vivian Lerche, Esq. specially appearing for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

The court noted there was no notice of contest for this matter.
Discussed (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT:

Grant. No opposition filed, and the Court finds that plaintiff carried its initial burden of proof to make a prima facie showing that there are no triable issues of material fact. (See Aguilar v. Atlantic Richfield Co. (2001) 25 Cal.4th 826, 850; Juge v. County of Sacramento (1993) 12 Cal.App.4th 59, 66.)

Prevailing/Moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and separate judgment via email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
